message:
fix(web): strip markdown formatting from TOC section titles

The RawResponseViewer TOC was showing raw markdown like **bold** and
*italic* in section titles. Now uses stripInlineMarkdownForTOC() to
clean titles before display.

Fixes issue where pages like /corpus/raw-gpt-batch-1 showed markdown
syntax in the "On this page" sidebar.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
